title: Phase 003 — Risk-Scored Impact Analysis (code_graph_impact_analysis)
description: ADAPT XCE xce_impact_analysis. Wrap detect_changes with 5 deterministic risk signals (fan-in, fan-out, hub centrality, test-coverage gap, edge confidence) + optional LLM enrichment. ~350 LOC. New code_graph_impact_analysis MCP tool + detect_changes integration.
